entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: The crop being studied for yield gap assessment in Iran

entities.name: BOUNDARY LINE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A cheap and simple method used to detect yield gaps and their causes without expensive experimentation

entities.name: YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between farmer's actual yield and potential yield

entities.name: POTENTIAL YIELD
entities.description: The highest yields obtained by farmers in the sample

entities.name: ACTUAL YIELD
entities.description: The yield actually achieved by farmers on their farms

entities.name: GOLESTAN PROVINCE
entities.description: A major wheat producing region in Iran where the study was conducted

entities.name: IRAN
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: IRRIGATED OR HIGH-RAINFALL
entities.description: A production situation based on agro- and geo-climatology criteria

entities.description: A production situation based on agro- and geo-climatology criteria

entities.description: A production situation based on agro- and geo-climatology criteria

entities.name: SOWING DATE
entities.description: A crop management practice used as a variable in boundary line analysis

entities.description: A crop management practice used as a variable in boundary line analysis
